response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack required for the role. They have also demonstrated proficiency in multiple programming languages and technologies relevant to the position.
strengths: Proven full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong background in multiple programming languages and technologies
Experience with AI agent development and various testing frameworks
concerns: No direct mention of experience with Nest.js or Vitest
Limited information on recent experience with Kotlin/Java
